title: Change in Keppel Dc Reit Management Pte. Ltd's position in Keppel DC REIT
body: Keppel Dc Reit Management Pte. Ltd executed a transaction for 1,648,292.0 shares of Keppel DC REIT. This increases their holdings from 33,340,162.0 to 34,988,454.0 shares.
holder_name: Keppel Dc Reit Management Pte. Ltd
